---
title: "Part3_Final"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| include: FALSE

library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(polite)
```


## Getting lists of parks
```{r}
robotstxt::paths_allowed("https://stateparks.com/") #tests if we can scrape


session <- bow("https://stateparks.com/minnesota_parks_and_recreation_destinations.html", force = TRUE)

mn_parks <- read_html("https://stateparks.com/minnesota_parks_and_recreation_destinations.html") #reads all of the text on the minnesota home page 

parks_list <- html_nodes(mn_parks, "#parklink a") #pulls a list of all parks and recreation destinations in minnesota 

parks_text <- html_text(parks_list) #makes the list into a text list
```

## test - writing a formula
```{r}
form <- parks_text[1] |>
  str_to_lower() |>
  str_replace_all(" ", "_") #for each park, the text is changed to lower case and put into snake case (_ instead of spaces)

url <- str_c("https://stateparks.com/", form, "_in_minnesota.html") #to create a list of the urls, this sets up the beginning and end of the url (which is the same for every park)


# formula -- generates urls we can scrape (only in mn) (adds the unique park name to the url for each list item)  --------------------------
url_list <- vector("character")
for (i in 1:length(parks_text)) {
  form <- parks_text[i] |>
  str_to_lower() |>
  str_replace_all(" ", "_")
  url <- str_c("https://stateparks.com/", form, "_in_minnesota.html")
  url_list <- c(url_list, url)
}
```
